app.title: Color Converter
app.description: A powerful tool for converting between Hex, RGB, OKLCH and Tailwind CSS colors

footer.builtWith: Built with Vite • React • TypeScript • Tailwind CSS

tooltips.hex:
Hexadecimal Color Format

Format: #RRGGBB

Components:
  R: Red (00–FF)
  G: Green (00–FF)
  B: Blue (00–FF)

Example: #3b82f6
tooltips.rgb:
RGB Color Format

Format: rgb(R, G, B)

Components:
  R: Red (0–255)
  G: Green (0–255)
  B: Blue (0–255)

Example: rgb(59, 130, 246)
tooltips.oklch:
Perceptually Uniform Color Space

Format: oklch(L, C, H)

Components:
  L: Lightness (0–1)
  C: Chroma (0–0.4, higher = more saturated)
  H: Hue (0°–360°)

Best for human-aligned color perception.
